title: Should I refinance my mortgage?
question_body: Community question about should i refinance my mortgage?
answer_body: Watch the term reset: lowering the rate but restarting 30 years can raise total interest paid.

title: Should I pay extra on my mortgage or invest?
question_body: Community question about should i pay extra on my mortgage or invest?
answer_body: Paying down a low fixed-rate mortgage is a guaranteed but modest return; investing has higher expected but uncertain returns.
combined_text: Should I pay extra on my mortgage or invest? Community question about should i pay extra on my mortgage or invest? Paying down a low fixed-rate mortgage is a guaranteed but modest return; investing has higher expected but uncertain returns. mortgage investing debt

title: Should I refinance my mortgage?
question_body: Community question about should i refinance my mortgage?
answer_body: Refinance when interest savings exceed closing costs and you will keep the loan past the break-even point.

title: What fees matter when choosing an ETF?
question_body: Community question about what fees matter when choosing an etf?
answer_body: A 0.5% vs 0.05% expense ratio compounds into a large gap over decades.

title: When should I prioritise retirement contributions?
question_body: Community question about when should i prioritise retirement contributions?
answer_body: After high-interest debt and a starter emergency fund, capture the full employer match before anything else.

title: Is it better to rent or buy a house?
question_body: Community question about is it better to rent or buy a house?
answer_body: Compare unrecoverable costs: rent vs mortgage interest, taxes, insurance, maintenance and transaction costs. Buying is not automatically better.

title: What fees matter when choosing an ETF?
question_body: Community question about what fees matter when choosing an etf?
answer_body: Expense ratio first, then bid-ask spread, tracking error and any platform commission.

title: Should I keep cash or buy bonds for short-term savings?
question_body: Community question about should i keep cash or buy bonds for short-term savings?
answer_body: Match the bond maturity to when you need the money to avoid selling at a loss.
